explanation: The current Critic notes identify several materially new and unresolved issues that are not repetitions from the Critic History. Specifically: 1) The Analyst still uses an unverified GDP conversion rate (4.0 PLN/USD) despite previous criticism about exchange rate verification needs; 2) The retail sector analysis remains limited to Żabka Group without addressing broader industry composition; 3) EU legal analysis lacks specific Articles 34 and 49 TFEU assessment; 4) Constitutional Tribunal application remains superficial; 5) The 90% effective tax base assumption lacks empirical basis; 6) KSeF implementation timeline verification is missing; 7) OECD Pillar Two compatibility timeline is not addressed; 8) Specific Polish automotive/electronics supply chain data is needed. These issues are materially new or unresolved from previous iterations and represent critical gaps that affect the analysis quality.
